explanation: This is the original command and serves as a baseline for testing detection accuracy.
Omission of the .exe extension, which is valid in Windows when the file is in the system PATH.
Insertion of extra spaces between the command and arguments, which is still parsed correctly by Windows.
Insertion of quotes around the service name, which is valid and does not change the command behavior.
Recoding using an environment variable to represent the service name, which is valid in a test environment.
